title: [phase:simulate] [family:api-shape] [provider_hint:codex] Propose a minimal API shape for a bounded tmux wrapper that replaces raw tmux commands used by real callsites. Constraints: no raw send-keys passthrough; must support has-session, capture-pane, list-sessions, list-windows, select-window/selec...
summary_text: **Minimal bounded wrapper shape** Use one RPC-style envelope: ```json { "action": "tmux.<name>", "args": { ... }, "guard": { ... } } ``` Read-only / low-risk actions (no raw tmux passthrough): 1. `tmux.has_session` ```json { "action":"tmux.has_session", "args":{"session":"build"} } ``` 2. `tmux.list_sessions` ```json { "action":"tmux.list_sessions", "args":{} } ``` 3. `tmux.list_windows` ```json { "action":"tmux.list_windows", "args":{"session":"build"} } ``` 4. `tmux.capture_pane` ```json { "action":"tmux.capture_pane", "args":{"session":"build","window":"1","pane":"%3","startLine":-200,"endLine":-1,"maxBytes":32768,"stripAnsi":true} } ``` 5. `tmux.select_window` ```json { "action":"tmux.select_window", "args":{"session":"build","window":"1"} } ``` 6. `tmux.select_pane` ```json { "action":"tmux.select_pane", "args":{"session":"build","window":"1","pane":"%3"} } ``` Gated mutation actions (required `guard.mutationToken`, scoped targets, audit reason): 1. `tmux.session_create` ```json { "action":"tmux.session_create", "args":{"session":"build","cwd":"/repo","shell":"bash","ifNotExists":true}, "guard":{"mutationToken":"...","reason":"start CI helper"} } ``` 2. `tmux.session_kill` ```json { "action":"tmux.session_kill", "args":{"session":"build","mode":"graceful"}, "guard":{"mutationToken":"...","reason":"cleanup"} } ``` 3. `tmux.inject_text` (bounded text only; no key-chords) ```json { "action":"tmux.inject_text", "args":{"session":"build","window":"1","pane":"%3","text":"npm test","maxBytes":512,"submit":"enter","normalizeNewlines":true}, "guard":{"mutationToken":"...","reason":"run tests"} } ``` **Hard bounds for injection** - Reject control sequences except `\n` (and optional `\t`). - Enforce `maxBytes` and optional per-call line-count cap. - No equivalent to `send-keys -X`, no arbitrary flags, no passthrough. **Defer (intentionally out of minimal v1)** - `new-window`, `split-window`, resize/layout changes. - Raw `send-keys`, function keys, chords, copy-mode commands. - Streaming subscriptions/events (`pipe-pane`, hooks). - Cross-host/session forwarding and environment mutation. - Rich history/search APIs beyond bounded `capture_pane`. Policy note: this is a lane-local proposal; final adoption should still pass your required multi-lane quorum review.
